author: wddgit
body:
#### PR description:

Move package FWCore/Catalog to FWStorage/Catalog.

This includes moving all the related #include statements and BuildFile.xml references.

There is also a small amount of cleanup in some of the files in the Catalog package. Mostly in breaking some very long comments lines and removing some comments that were not really adding any value.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/1716

#### PR validation:

Compiles. Existing unit tests pass. This should not affect output of anything.
title: Move package named Catalog from FWCore to FWStorage
